arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen vs Heidenheim preview: Champions in need of post-international reset
arts.sum: Xabi Alonso will be hoping his Bayer Leverkusen side can get back to winning ways when they host struggling Heidenheim at the BayArena on Saturday for their 11th Bundesliga match of the season.

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen’s Victor Boniface to miss the rest of the year with a thigh injury
arts.sum: Sky Germany reports that Bayer Leverkusen’s Victor Boniface will be out for the rest of the year with a thigh injury he picked up on international duty. Boniface is said to…

arts.ttl: Alonso gives Boniface update amid reports star striker could miss rest of 2024
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen coach Xabi Alonso has confirmed that Victor Boniface suffered an injury during the international break and will miss "several games" as a result.
Action from the German top flight returns after the international break and Alex Jack is on hand to provide score predictions for all nine Bundesliga games this weekend.

arts.ttl: Preview: Bayer Leverkusen vs. Heidenheim - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Bundesliga clash between Bayer Leverkusen and Heidenheim, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Boniface misses Leverkusen training amid injury reports
arts.sum: Victor Boniface wasn't in training for Bayer Leverkusen on Thursday amid reports he suffered an injury on international duty with Nigeria.

arts.ttl: Florian Wirtz: 'Favourites' to sign Man City, Real Madrid, Liverpool-linked star 'revealed'
arts.sum: Manchester City are reportedly leading Real Madrid, Liverpool and Bayern Munich in the race to sign Bayer Leverkusen star Florian Wirtz.

arts.ttl: Leverkusen have lost what won them last season's Bundesliga
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen had a knack for snatching late wins en route to a shock Bundesliga crown in 2023-24. That isn't happening this season, though.
